label: Pawns arrival mode
description: Defines how a raiding or visiting group of pawns arrives on the map (e.g. walking from edge, drop pods, tunneling). Referenced by FactionDef arrival mode white/blacklists.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# PawnsArrivalModeWorker subclass that implements the arrival logic for this mode.

selectionWeightCurve.label: Selection weight curve
selectionWeightCurve.description: Piecewise linear curve mapping incident points to relative selection weight. Used when no per-faction curve applies.

pointsFactorCurve.label: Points factor curve
pointsFactorCurve.description: Piecewise linear curve mapping incident points to a raid-points multiplier applied after this mode is chosen.

minTechLevel.label: Min tech level
minTechLevel.description: Minimum faction tech level required for this arrival mode to be eligible.

forQuickMilitaryAid.label: For quick military aid
forQuickMilitaryAid.description: If true, this arrival mode is used when a faction sends a quick military aid response.

walkIn.label: Walk in
walkIn.description: If true, pawns walk in from the map edge rather than being dropped. Affects music and certain eligibility checks.

canBeBackup.label: Can be backup
canBeBackup.description: If true, this arrival mode can be selected as a backup when the primary mode is ineligible.

minSpaceSelectionWeight.label: Min space selection weight
minSpaceSelectionWeight.description: Minimum selection weight when the raid is on a space (Odyssey) tile. -1 means no space-specific floor.

biomeWhitelist.label: Biome whitelist
biomeWhitelist.description: If non-empty, this arrival mode can only be used on maps with one of these BiomeDefs.

biomeBlacklist.label: Biome blacklist
biomeBlacklist.description: BiomeDefs on which this arrival mode may not be used.

layerWhitelist.label: Layer whitelist
layerWhitelist.description: If non-empty, this arrival mode can only be used on tiles with one of these PlanetLayerDefs (Odyssey).

layerBlacklist.label: Layer blacklist
layerBlacklist.description: PlanetLayerDefs on which this arrival mode may not be used (Odyssey).

textEnemy.label: Text (enemy)
textEnemy.description: Flavor text shown when a hostile group arrives using this mode. Supports RimWorld format placeholders such as {0} and {0_pawnsPluralDef}.

textFriendly.label: Text (friendly)
textFriendly.description: Flavor text shown when a friendly group arrives using this mode.

textWillArrive.label: Text (will arrive)
textWillArrive.description: Flavor text shown when a group is announced as incoming using this mode.

selectionWeightCurvesPerFaction.label: Selection weight curves per faction
selectionWeightCurvesPerFaction.description: Per-faction overrides for the selection weight curve. When a raid faction matches an entry, its curve is used instead of selectionWeightCurve.

walk-in-arrival.label: Walk-in arrival
walk-in-arrival.description: Arrival mode where pawns walk in from the map edge.

drop-pod-arrival.label: Drop pod arrival
drop-pod-arrival.description: Arrival mode where pawns drop in via pods. Optionally restricted to a tech level and planet layer.
